windows.summary_v2: An empty red plastic mixing bowl with waxy residue sits on a white digital kitchen scale atop parchment paper, set up for weighing candle ingredients.

tags_v2.action: placing empty mixing bowl on scale to weigh ingredients
tags_v2.setting: kitchen worktable lined with parchment paper

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of an empty deep red/magenta plastic mixing bowl with glossy waxy residue coating its interior, set on a small white digital kitchen scale; the scale and bowl rest on white parchment/butcher paper over a pale table, a grey item visible at top-right edge.

Near-identical static shot; the red bowl sits centered on the white digital scale whose small grey LCD shows a reading, sheets of kraft/parchment paper spread beneath on the white surface, nothing yet added to the bowl.

Same empty red bowl on the digital scale, interior streaked with residual wax; the scale's display panel faces the camera at the bowl's base, parchment paper underneath, waiting for ingredients to be weighed.
Static overhead of the magenta bowl on the white scale, the platform supporting the bowl's footed base, paper-lined table around it; scene unchanged as the maker talks about weighing everything out.
Continued hold on the empty red mixing bowl tared on the digital scale, glossy wax film inside the bowl, small LCD lit at the front of the scale, kraft paper surrounding.
Same composition: red bowl on white scale on parchment, interior reflective from prior wax use, no hands or product present, the setup ready for weighing wax.
Overhead view essentially unchanged; the empty red bowl sits on the digital scale's platform, display visible at base, paper-covered table around, awaiting the next ingredient.
Static frame of the magenta bowl on the white kitchen scale, waxy-sheened interior, scale LCD facing camera, parchment paper beneath on the white worktable.
Final frame: identical overhead of the empty red bowl seated on the white digital scale on parchment paper, ready for the weigh-out step, no change in contents.
